articles.title: How to Generate AI Images with n8n and Nano Banana Pro (Step-by-Step Template)
articles.brief: Tutorial-style post walking through your Pro template step by step. n8n.io owns the template listings but not the tutorial SERP — lead with a real output example, show the workflow screenshot, compare Nano Banana pricing to alternatives, and link to the template. Target long-tail: 'n8n AI image workflow tutorial'.

articles.title: 5 Claude Code Automations I Use Every Week (With Prompts)
articles.brief: Net-new content play — no existing ranking but high topical relevance to your brand. Show 5 real Claude Code workflows you actually run (SEO, code gen, data pipelines). Include exact prompts and outputs. This builds topical authority for 'claude code' keyword cluster and positions you as a practitioner, not a reviewer.

articles.title: Mike Futia — AI Automation Systems for DTC Brands
articles.brief: Branded landing page optimized for 'Mike Futia' (not generic 'futia' — the university owns that). Include name in title, H1, URL slug, and schema markup. Add sections: what you do, recent projects, featured templates. This is a quick win — one page displaces the GitHub academic profile currently ranking.

articles.title: Nano Banana vs Flux vs DALL-E: Cheapest AI Image API for Automations (2026)
articles.brief: Comparison post targeting buyers evaluating AI image APIs for automation workflows. Lead with a pricing table above the fold (Google AI Overview bait). Include real cost-per-image data from your n8n runs. This captures commercial intent traffic that n8n.io's template pages don't address.
